zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Bernake於1302年出生在英國越可爾克雷頓時，她的父親Sir Willaim Bernanke22歲，母親Alice Driby18歲。她於1327年與Sir James Byron在英國藍卡爾克雷頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年在英國藍卡爾克雷頓享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Bernake于1302年出生在英国越可爾克雷頓时，她的父亲Sir Willaim Bernanke22岁，母亲Alice Driby18岁。她于1327年与Sir James Byron在英国藍卡爾克雷頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年在英国藍卡爾克雷頓享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bernake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jaime, Pedro, Salvador, Alberto, Jose Luis, Juan, Luis, Roberto, Carlos, Damaso, Emilio.  Italian Antonio, Aldo, Angelo, Cecilio, Filiberto, Lucio, Marco.
Spanish and French (Bernabé); Italian (Bernabè): from local forms of the Biblical personal name Barnabas (see Barnaby ).

variants.name: Barnaby
meanings: from the Middle English vernacular form of the Greek and Latin personal name Barnabas, which was borne by the companion of St. Paul (Acts 4:36). This is of Aramaic origin, from Aramaic bar naḅyā ‘son of the prophet’, although the Greek text of Acts 4:36 explains the name as hyios paraklēseōs ‘son of consolation’ or ‘encouragement’.

habitational name from any of the four places: Barnaby in North Yorkshire, Barnetby le Wold or Barnoldby le Beck (both in Lincolnshire), or Barnby in Suffolk. Barnaby in North Yorkshire is named with the Old English personal name Beornwald (composed of the elements beorn ‘young warrior’ + wald ‘rule’) + Old Norse bȳ ‘settlement, farmstead’. Barnby in Suffolk is named with Old Norse barn ‘child, offspring’ + bȳ meaning ‘children's farm’, perhaps for an estate divided by heirs.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Bernake was born in 1302, in Clayton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Willaim Bernanke, was 22 and her mother, Alice Driby, was 18. She married Sir James Byron in 1327, in Clayton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1350, in Clayton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Bernake est née en 1302, à Clayton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Willaim Bernanke, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alice Driby, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Byron en 1327, à Clayton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1350, à Clayton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Bernake 1302 in Clayton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Willaim Bernanke 22 und ihre Mutter Alice Driby 18. Sie hat 1327 in Clayton, Lancashire, England Sir James Byron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Clayton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bernake è nata il nel 1302 nel Clayton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Willaim Bernanke, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Alice Driby, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Byron nel 1327, nel Clayton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1350, nel Clayton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bernakeが1302年にイギリスヨークシュアイアクレイトンで生まれた時，父Sir Willaim Bernankeは22歳，母Alice Dribyは18歳であった。1327年にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトンでSir James Byronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1350年にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bernake(이)가 1302년 영국 요르크실르 클레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Willaim Bernanke(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Driby(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1327년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 Sir James Byron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir James Byron em 1327, em Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1350, em Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Bernake родилась в 1302 г. в местности клеитон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Willaim Bernanke было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Driby, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Byron в 1327 г. в местности клеитон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1350 г. в местности клеитон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.
